data.description: US APPEALS COURT PAUSES ORDER LIMITING IMMIGRATION AGENTS’ USE OF FORCE IN MINNESOTA

data.title: ADLM launches data science program for lab professionals; aims to utilize healthcare data.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, the Association for Diagnostics & Laboratory Medicine (ADLM) revealed the introduction of the Data Science in Laboratory Medicine Certificate Program. This program aims to aid clinical laboratory professionals and pathologists in utilizing healthcare data effectively.

data.title: Telix Pharmaceuticals reports $804 million in full-year revenue, with a 46% increase in Q4 revenue reaching $208 million.
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited reported its fiscal 2025 revenue of approximately $804 million, meeting its upgraded guidance of $800-$820 million. The company saw a significant 46% year-over-year increase in fourth-quarter revenue, totaling around $208 million. The Precision Medicine business generated about $161 million in revenue, showing a 4% quarter-over-quarter growth. Telix is making progress with its clinical studies, treating international patients in the ProstACT Global Phase 3 study and SOLACE Phase 1 study in the U.S. They also dosed the first patient in the U.S. in the BiPASS Phase 3 trial. Telix stock is at lows, possibly due to testing lower boundaries.

data.title: Greene County Bancorp, Inc. declares $0.10 per share cash dividend, maintaining annual rate at $0.40 per share.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Greene County Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ-GCBC) based in Catskill, New York, disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share for the company's common stock. This represents an annual cash dividend rate of $0.40 per share, mirroring the rate set in the previous quarter.

data.title: Company submits official proxy materials & sends message to shareholders via mail.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that over 2,000 new cases of COVID-19 have been recorded in the past 24 hours. This marks a significant increase from previous days, bringing the total number of confirmed cases in the country to more than 50,000. Additionally, there have been 15 new deaths reported, bringing the total number of fatalities to 750. Authorities are urging the public to continue following safety protocols and guidelines to curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: InventHelp inventors create new thermal feeding bottle for calves, named BOVI-BOTTLE. Designed to maintain safe temperature.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 21, 2026, two inventors from Danville, Ohio unveiled their creation, the BOVI-BOTTLE. The innovative bottle aims to ensure a safe and healthy temperature for feeding calves. The inventors highlighted that their design can withstand high temperatures.

data.title: 33 Greenberg Traurig attorneys acknowledged in 2026 Illinois Super Lawyers, with 22 on Super Lawyers list and 11 on Rising Stars list.
data.description: In Chicago, as of January 21, 2026, a total of 33 attorneys from Greenberg Traurig, LLP have been recognized on the 2026 Illinois Super Lawyers and Rising Stars lists. Within this group, 22 individuals have been named on the "Super Lawyers" list, while 11 have been designated as "Rising Stars". Notably, one of the shareholders, Nancy A. Peterman, has also achieved a special distinction for her exemplary performance.

data.title: Ionic Digital Inc. in Austin, Texas released their December 2025 Mining and Operations Update, showcasing their support for AI and high-performance computing.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on January 21, 2026, Ionic Digital Inc. released its unaudited Mining and Operations Update for December 2025. The company, specializing in digital infrastructure for AI and high-performance computing, reported on their activities for that month.

data.title: Sioux Honey Co-op and Smoothie King donate 6,480 bottles of honey to Second Helpings Atlanta food rescue network.
data.description: In Atlanta on January 21, 2026, Sioux Honey Co-op and Smoothie King jointly contributed 6,480 bottles of honey to the Second Helpings Atlanta food rescue network. This donation, equivalent to the amount needed to cover a full football field, is set to provide significant support to the organization's efforts in helping people in need.

data.title: Ad Age ranks Ars X Machina as No. 4 Best Place to Work, emphasizing empathy, autonomy, and flexibility.
data.description: Ranked as the No. 4 company for prioritizing empathy, autonomy, and flexibility, AXM upholds its culture of awareness in San Francisco. The technology-driven media agency, AXM, known for its Agile Mix Modeling™ approach, has been recognized by Ad Age as one of the Best Places to Work. This acknowledgment highlights AXM's commitment to fostering a supportive work environment centered around key values.

data.title: Cruise Planners dominates travel franchise rankings for 2026, signaling major growth ahead for industry, says LinkedIn.
data.description: Experts in the travel industry discuss the rising trend of individuals transitioning their passion for travel into successful careers. Recent data from LinkedIn, the leading professional network, shows a significant increase in job opportunities within the travel sector. The platform's latest Jobs on the Rise list, released on January 21, 2026, showcases the remarkable growth in this area. This shift is indicative of more people turning their wanderlust into meaningful professions, with a growing number of individuals pursuing travel-related occupations for their livelihood.

data.title: Save A Lot honors 21 Hometown Heroes in 2025, awarding $10,500 in gift cards to recognize community service.
data.description: Save A Lot, a prominent discount grocery chain in the US, is commemorating the success of its Hometown Heroes initiative, launched in 2023 to acknowledge the contributions of individuals and groups positively impacting the neighborhoods where its stores are located. In 2025, 21 Hometown Heroes were honored by Save A Lot, receiving a total of $10,500 in Save A Lot gift cards. This program highlights those who truly embody the spirit of community service.

data.title: Trump promotes nuclear energy at Davos, boosting nuclear stocks. Calls it safe, efficient fuel source for growth.
data.description: Stocks in the nuclear energy sector saw an increase on Wednesday morning following a speech by President Donald Trump at the 2026 World Economic Forum in Davos. Trump highlighted nuclear energy as a safe and efficient solution to support the growth of manufacturing and AI in the United States. SMR stock is on the rise, reflecting this sentiment. The President emphasized the importance of nuclear energy, labeling it as clean, reliable, and powerful in comparison to what he viewed as the expensive and wasteful wind and solar sectors. Trump's speech further discussed recent executive orders aimed at simplifying nuclear reactor licensing and expediting small modular reactor development. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
ANTHROPIC’S REVENUE RUN RATE TOPPED $9 BILLION AT END OF 2025

data.title: Dickey's Barbecue Pit launches Fully Loaded Fridays: Buy One, Get One giant loaded bakers until Jan 31.
data.description: In Dallas, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit® is making Fridays more convenient with Fully Loaded Fridays promotion, offering a Buy One, Get One Free deal on their Giant Loaded Baker. This offer, available until January 31, includes the popular dish filled with pit-smoked meats and traditional Dickey’s sides. The Giant Baker provides a substantial meal option for a comforting Friday dinner and an effortless lunch for the following day. With winter approaching, customers are seeking hearty and fulfilling dishes, making this promotion perfect for those looking for a satisfying meal.

data.title: Auction Direct USA in Raleigh offers some of the safest used small SUVs on the market in 2026.
data.description: Auction Direct USA in Raleigh, N.C., announced on Jan. 21, 2026, that they are showcasing a range of used small SUVs, known for being among the safest vehicles in their category. Several models have received top safety ratings, making them a reliable option for buyers looking for secure transportation.

data.title: Rezolve Ai secures $250M financing, strengthens balance sheet for growth through M&A and enterprise scaling.
data.description: A recent capital raise has equipped the Company with the resources to fast-track mergers and acquisitions, expand enterprise deployments, and capitalize on sustained revenue growth from the adoption of AI technology. This strategic move will enable the Company to leverage significant funds for future ventures, including increasing M&A activity and expanding enterprise installations to drive revenue growth through AI adoption.

data.title: Investment firm F/m Investments files SEC application for tokenized shares in ETF; $18 billion assets; first of its kind.
data.description: An investment firm, F/m Investments, with assets totaling $18 billion, has submitted an exemptive application to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) requesting approval to document ownership of tokenized shares in the F/m US Treasury 3 Month Bill ETF (TBIL) on a permissioned blockchain ledger. This move marks a significant step as it is the initial application of its kind by an ETF issuer seeking SEC dispensation for tokenized shares of a registered investment company. The firm believes that tokenization is the future of investment.

data.title: Veridas protects mobile connections for 100M Mexicans under new regulation linking phone numbers to IDs.
data.description: In Mexico City, a significant development took place on January 9 with the implementation of new Guidelines for the Identification of Mobile Telephone Lines, aimed at enhancing digital identity and combating fraud within the country. The regulation mandates that all operators must associate each mobile phone line with a verified official identity. As a result, Veridas, a renowned figure in identity and cybersecurity on a global scale, has positioned itself as the key technological collaborator for the telecommunications sector. This partnership underscores the commitment to implementing secure measures, with the potential to impact a substantial number of mobile phone users across the nation.

data.title: AAVE price set to reach $190-195 by February 2026, despite short-term bearish signals at $155 support.
data.description: Analysts have diverse predictions for AAVE's price, estimating a target range of $190-195 by February 2026. However, the current technical indicators are advising caution, particularly around the $155 support levels.
